message:
fix(polyfill): preserve native Zig path module, only add missing functions in JS

- Add guard to check if native path module already exists before creating JS version
- Native Zig path module (src/polyfills/path.zig) provides: join, dirname, basename, extname, normalize
- JS polyfill now only adds missing functions: resolve, isAbsolute, relative, parse, format
- This implements 'thin JS / host rich Zig' architecture principle
- Fixes path.join test by using native normalize implementation
